login.title: 登录 Nexus
login.description: 使用你的 GitHub 账户继续。

pricing.title: 价格
pricing.invalidRechargeAmount: 请输入有效的充值金额。

tela.description: 后端、基础设施、测试和可靠性工作。

sophie.description: 前端交付、界面打磨和产品页面。

jules.description: Java Spring Boot 后端、API 和持久化交付。
jules.persistenceAndApi: 持久化与 API 设计

assistant.description: PR review、测试和低噪音自动合并。

publishTask.title: 发布任务
publishTask.description: 创建并分配新的智能体工作项。
publishTask.question: 问题
publishTask.questionPlaceholder: 描述智能体应执行的任务。
publishTask.routingDescription: 选择外部 issue 链接和目标智能体；仓库与项目来自该实例已保存的 workspace 配置。
publishTask.noActiveAgents: 没有可用的活跃智能体实例
publishTask.activateAgentHint: 发布任务前，请创建或激活智能体实例。
publishTask.selectedWorkspaceDescription: 发布任务时将直接使用这个实例当前保存的仓库与项目。
publishTask.workspaceRequiredDescription: 当前实例还没有配置可用的 workspace。
publishTask.footerHint: 发布的任务会直接提交到后端队列。
publishTask.toastPublishedDescription: 任务已提交到后端队列。

workspaceSettings.title: 实例与工作区
workspaceSettings.description: 用接近成员目录的方式管理每个 agent instance 的头像、昵称和 workspace 路由上下文。
workspaceSettings.directoryDescription: 每个实例都在这里维护自己的头像、昵称以及发布任务时使用的仓库与项目。发布任务页只会读取这里已经保存的 workspace 配置。
workspaceSettings.emptyDescription: 购买 agent 后，这里会显示对应的实例与 workspace 配置入口。
workspaceSettings.nicknamePlaceholder: 可选，用于前端展示和区分实例
workspaceSettings.editorDescription: 昵称用于前端区分实例；仓库和项目会成为这个实例后续发布任务时的默认路由上下文。
workspaceSettings.configHint: 请先配置仓库和项目；发布任务页只会读取这里保存的 workspace 配置。
workspaceSettings.publishReady: 这个实例的 workspace 已配置完成，发布任务时会直接使用这里的路由上下文。
workspaceSettings.noResultsTitle: 没有符合当前筛选条件的实例
workspaceSettings.noResultsDescription: 可以清空搜索词或调整筛选条件，再继续编辑实例配置。
workspaceSettings.footerHint: 头像使用公开可用的 notion 风格插画头像，实例名和 workspace 配置仍然是你自己的数据。

taskBoard.title: 任务看板
taskBoard.description: 按后端任务状态分组的实时任务看板。

codeReview.title: 代码评审
codeReview.description: 查看 Nexus 评审任务，并跳转到 GitHub 执行评审操作。
codeReview.emptyQueue: {{queue}} 队列中没有 Nexus 任务。

processTracking.title: 进度追踪
processTracking.description: 选择智能体和运行中的任务，然后询问最新进度。
processTracking.selectTaskDescription: 选择要向该智能体咨询的运行中任务。
processTracking.noRunningTasks: 所选智能体没有可用的运行中任务。
processTracking.chatHintReady: 询问最新进度、阻塞项或预计完成时间。
processTracking.chatHintEmpty: 选择智能体和任务后开始聊天。
processTracking.inputPlaceholderReady: 询问最新进度、阻塞项或预计完成时间…
processTracking.timelineHint: 按时间展示关键执行事件。
processTracking.timelineMuted: 已弱化 {{count}} 个低价值事件。
processTracking.timelineEmpty: 暂无可展示的关键执行事件。
processTracking.timelineLoadFailedDescription: 无法获取所选任务的执行事件。

productResearch.title: 产品研究
productResearch.description: 评审收到的需求，并查看功能级交付进度。
productResearch.requirementApprovedPlanningStarted: 需求已批准，正在生成计划
productResearch.loadDataFailedDescription: 加载产品研究数据失败。
productResearch.showingEntries: 显示第 {{start}} 到 {{end}} 条，共 {{total}} 条
productResearch.planningRecoverConfirm: 确认恢复计划生成？系统会重新提交规划任务。
productResearch.planningFailedInlineFallback: 计划生成失败，请查看任务日志后重新发起。
productResearch.workItemFailedFallback: 任务执行失败，请查看任务日志或点击重试。
productResearch.workItemRetryStarted: 已提交 work item 重试任务
productResearch.workItemRetryFailedDescription: 无法提交重试请求，请稍后再试。
productResearch.workItemTaskLoadFailedDescription: 无法加载任务错误详情。
productResearch.planningMissingRunInline: 当前缺少计划记录，可以恢复计划生成。
productResearch.planningMissingTaskInline: 找不到对应的 Planning Task，可以重新创建。
productResearch.planningReadyHint: 计划已经生成并通过校验，可以查看正式的计划列表。
productResearch.planningPendingPlanList: 计划列表会在计划生成完成并通过校验后开放。

planningMessage.queued: 系统已经接收这份已批准的提案，正在等待规划任务开始执行。
planningMessage.running: 系统正在把这份已批准的提案拆解成 feature 和 feature item。
planningMessage.failed: 这次计划生成没有产出有效的执行计划，请重新生成。
planningMessage.completed: 这份提案已经生成并通过校验，可以作为正式计划继续执行。
planningMessage.missing: 这份已批准的提案缺少计划生成记录，当前不能判断计划是否真正开始。

productResearch.planListEmpty: 当此提案关联到功能和功能项后，计划列表会显示在这里。
productResearch.emptyRequirementsProject: 没有匹配所选项目的需求。
productResearch.emptyFeaturesProject: 没有匹配所选项目的功能。
productResearch.emptyFeatures: 暂无正在追踪的实现功能。
productResearch.decisionBriefUnavailable: 该章节暂无结构化摘要。请切换到“描述”查看原始内容。
productResearch.decisionBriefFullTextHint: 需要更多证据、风险和完整计划时，请切换到“描述”查看原始内容。

taskDetail.title: 任务详情
taskDetail.loadingDescription: 正在获取最新任务详情。
taskDetail.notFoundDescription: 请求的任务 ID 不存在：{{taskId}}
taskDetail.legacyDescription: 任务路由和执行上下文。
taskDetail.backendDescription: 后端返回的真实任务记录。

notFound.pageDescription: 这个工作区地址可能已失效或输入有误。
notFound.heading: 这里没有可打开的页面
notFound.body: 你访问的工作区页面不存在，可能是链接过期、路径输入有误，或功能入口已经调整。你可以回到任务看板继续工作。

login.title: Login to Nexus
login.description: Use your GitHub account to continue.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.invalidRechargeAmount: Please enter a valid recharge amount.

tela.description: Backend, infra, tests, and reliability work.

sophie.description: Frontend delivery, UI polish, and product pages.

jules.description: Java Spring Boot backend, API, and persistence delivery.

assistant.description: PR review, testing, and low-noise auto-merge.

publishTask.title: Publish Task
publishTask.description: Create and assign new work items for agents.
publishTask.question: Question
publishTask.questionPlaceholder: Describe the task the agent should execute.
publishTask.routingDescription: Choose the outer issue link and target agent; repository and project come from the saved workspace for that instance.
publishTask.activateAgentHint: Create or activate an agent instance before publishing a task.
publishTask.selectedWorkspaceDescription: Publishing this task will use the repository and project currently saved on this instance.
publishTask.workspaceRequiredDescription: This instance does not have a usable workspace configured yet.
publishTask.footerHint: Published tasks are submitted directly to the backend queue.
publishTask.toastPublishedDescription: The task has been submitted to the backend queue.

workspaceSettings.title: Instances and Workspaces
workspaceSettings.description: Manage each agent instance with a directory-style layout for avatars, nicknames, and workspace routing context.
workspaceSettings.directoryDescription: Each instance keeps its avatar, nickname, repository, and project here. The publish-task page only reads the saved workspace configuration from this directory.
workspaceSettings.emptyDescription: Purchased agents will appear here so their workspace context can be configured.
workspaceSettings.searchPlaceholder: Search by nickname, repository, or project
workspaceSettings.nicknamePlaceholder: Optional label used in the UI
workspaceSettings.editorDescription: The nickname is for the UI only. The repository and project become the routing context used when this instance publishes tasks.
workspaceSettings.configHint: Set the repository and project here first; the publish-task page only reads the saved workspace context.
workspaceSettings.publishReady: This instance already has a saved workspace context, and publish-task will route through it directly.
workspaceSettings.noResultsTitle: No instances match the current filters
workspaceSettings.noResultsDescription: Clear the search or adjust the filters to continue editing instance settings.
workspaceSettings.footerHint: Avatars use a publicly available Notion-style illustration set; instance names and workspace data remain your own.

taskBoard.title: Task Board
taskBoard.description: Live task board grouped by backend task status.

codeReview.title: Code Review
codeReview.description: View Nexus review tasks and jump to GitHub for review actions.
codeReview.noPrLinked: No GitHub PR has been linked yet.

processTracking.title: Process Tracking
processTracking.description: Select an agent and running task, then ask for the latest process.
processTracking.selectTaskDescription: Choose the running task you want to consult about for this agent.
processTracking.noRunningTasks: No running tasks available for the selected agent.
processTracking.chatHintReady: Ask for the latest process, blockers, or ETA.
processTracking.chatHintEmpty: Select an agent and task to start chatting.
processTracking.inputPlaceholderReady: Ask for the latest process, blockers, or ETA...
processTracking.consultFailedDescription: Failed to consult the selected task.
processTracking.timelineHint: Key execution events in chronological order.
processTracking.timelineEmpty: No key execution events to show yet.
processTracking.timelineLoadFailedDescription: Could not fetch execution events for the selected task.

productResearch.title: Product Research
productResearch.description: Review incoming requirements and inspect feature-level delivery progress.
productResearch.updateProposalFailedDescription: Failed to update the selected proposal.
productResearch.loadDataFailedDescription: Failed to load product research data.
productResearch.noFeatureItems: No feature items have been created yet.
productResearch.planningRecoverConfirm: Resume planning? This will submit the planning task again.
productResearch.planningRecoverFailedDescription: Failed to recover the planning flow.
productResearch.planningFailedInlineFallback: Planning failed. Review the task log before starting another attempt.
productResearch.workItemFailedFallback: The task failed. Review the task log or retry it.
productResearch.workItemRetryFailedDescription: Unable to submit the retry request. Please try again later.
productResearch.workItemTaskLoadFailedDescription: Unable to load the task error detail.
productResearch.planningMissingRunInline: The planning run record is missing. You can resume the planning flow.
productResearch.planningMissingTaskInline: The linked Planning Task is missing. You can recreate it.
productResearch.planningReadyHint: The plan has been validated and is ready to inspect as the formal plan list.
productResearch.planningPendingPlanList: Plan list will open once planning finishes and the output passes validation.

planningMessage.queued: The approved proposal has been accepted and is waiting for the planning task to start.
planningMessage.running: The system is turning this approved proposal into features and feature items.
planningMessage.failed: This planning attempt did not produce a valid execution plan. Please click regenerate.
planningMessage.completed: This proposal already has a validated plan and can move forward as the formal execution plan.
planningMessage.missing: This approved proposal is missing a planning run record, so the UI cannot confirm whether planning actually started.

productResearch.planListEmpty: Plan list will appear here once this proposal is linked to features and feature items.
productResearch.emptyRequirementsProject: No requirements match the selected project.
productResearch.emptyRequirementsPending: No requirements are waiting for review.
productResearch.emptyFeaturesProject: No features match the selected project.
productResearch.emptyFeatures: No implementation features are being tracked yet.
productResearch.decisionBriefUnavailable: This section is not available as a structured summary. Open Description for the original content.
productResearch.decisionBriefFullTextHint: For more evidence, risks, and the complete plan, open Description to view the original content.

taskDetail.title: Task Detail
taskDetail.notFoundDescription: The requested task ID does not exist: {{taskId}}
taskDetail.backendDescription: Real task record returned by the backend.

notFound.pageDescription: This workspace address may be stale or mistyped.
notFound.heading: There is no page here
notFound.body: The workspace page you opened does not exist. The link may be outdated, mistyped, or moved. You can return to the task board and continue from there.
